fifa_world_cup.note: Rated 52 current-squad players across 2 teams; generated 3 moneyline/spread/total rows without head-to-head or trained-model inputs.

key_factors: Current World Cup roster and availability
Player club-league and club-table power rankings
Current tournament record, goals for, and goals against
Venue scoring: limited venue sample at Lincoln Financial Field
picks.model_basis: current squad player power, tournament form, venue scoring, and market context; no head-to-head input
picks.reason: France owns the stronger current-squad projection. Attack 92.6, midfield 91.6, defense 93.0, goalkeeper 90.4. Top player ranks: Maxence Lacroix 93.5, William Saliba 93.5, Jean-Philippe Mateta 93.5. France form 3-0-0 (3.00 pts/g, 3.33-0.33 goals/g).

picks.model_basis: current squad player power, tournament form, venue scoring, and market context; no head-to-head input
picks.reason: Projected goals France 1.73, Paraguay 0.93 after tournament-form, venue, and market-total blending.

picks.model_basis: current squad player power, tournament form, venue scoring, and market context; no head-to-head input
picks.reason: Paraguay has the best spread-cover edge at +1.5 from the venue-adjusted Poisson score grid.
